narrative:
West Chester Twp 22 (precinct in Butler County) has 991 registered voters, with 67.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
